channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 379c52cb-64de-498c-8b5b-c6170d6c49d4
Display name: Cognitive Services Content Understanding Reader
Description: Has access to read, list, and analyze operations for Azure AI Content Understanding. Can list and view analyzers, classifiers, and person directories, and run analysis and classification jobs, but cannot create, update, or delete resources.
Link: https://management.azure.com/379c52cb-64de-498c-8b5b-c6170d6c49d4?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 4b42bd01-da42-4c92-9b07-15ea5bd6a602
Display name: Cognitive Services Content Understanding Owner
Description: Has full access to all Azure AI Content Understanding operations including read, create, update, delete, analyze, and test. Can manage all analyzers, classifiers, labeling projects, and person directories.
Link: https://management.azure.com/4b42bd01-da42-4c92-9b07-15ea5bd6a602?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 59a2dba3-6303-4fd8-9a2e-8cbb4bdda972
Display name: Cognitive Services Content Understanding Contributor
Description: Has access to read, create, update, analyze, and test operations for Azure AI Content Understanding. Can manage analyzers, classifiers, labeling projects, and person directories, but cannot delete analyzers or classifiers, manage role assignments, or list account keys.
Link: https://management.azure.com/59a2dba3-6303-4fd8-9a2e-8cbb4bdda972?api-version=2022-04-01
